app.name: AccessGrid Sync
login.title: Sign in
login.rate_limited.one: Too many failed attempts. Try again in about 1 minute.
login.rate_limited.many: Too many failed attempts. Try again in about {minutes} minutes.
wizard.title: Setup
wizard.step1.title: Create administrator account
wizard.step1.subtitle: This account is the only way to manage the sync tool. There is no password recovery — pick something you can remember or store it in a password manager.
wizard.step2.title: AccessGrid credentials
wizard.step2.subtitle: Enter your AccessGrid account ID and API secret. We'll test the connection before saving.
wizard.step3.title: Choose your PACS
wizard.step3.subtitle: Select which Physical Access Control System this NUC will sync from.
wizard.step4.title: PACS credentials
wizard.step4.subtitle: Enter the credentials for your PACS. We'll test the connection before saving.
wizard.step5.title: Setup complete
wizard.step5.subtitle: The sync engine will start automatically. Open the Status page to watch the first cycle run.
status.title: Sync status
credentials.title: Issued credentials
credentials.empty: No credentials issued yet. Run a sync to provision them.
logs.title: Logs
logs.empty: No log entries match the current filters.
settings.title: Settings
settings.site_code.saved: Site code updated. Newly issued credentials will use it.
settings.site_code.invalid: Site code must be a non-negative integer.
settings.site_code.not_configured: AccessGrid is not configured yet — finish the wizard first.
settings.dedupe.label: Skip provisioning when an AG card with the same site code + card number already exists
settings.dedupe.help: Enable on each instance when running multiple sync tools against separate PACS that share the same AccessGrid template.
settings.extra_metadata.help: Key/value pairs added to the metadata of every newly provisioned AccessGrid card. Existing cards aren't back-filled.
settings.extra_metadata.reserved_note: These keys are managed by the sync engine and can't be set here:
settings.extra_metadata.saved: Extra metadata saved. Newly provisioned cards will use it.
settings.extra_metadata.err.empty_key: Each row needs a non-empty key (or leave both fields blank to delete the row).
settings.extra_metadata.err.reserved: "{key}" is reserved by the sync engine and can't be used as extra metadata.
settings.extra_metadata.err.bad_chars: "{key}" has invalid characters. Use letters, digits, underscore, or hyphen.
settings.extra_metadata.err.too_long: "{key}" is too long. Limit is 64 characters.
